````html
// Visualization Script - Multiple Channel Line Charts (Dark Mode) + Aligned "All Channels" Chart
// - Adds a top chart that aligns all channels on a master frequency axis
// - Does NOT assume channel_id exists (falls back to stable per-result index label)
// - Keeps per-channel charts as-is (no dots)

const template = `
<style>
  body {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 16px;
    background: #141821;
    color: #e7edf8;
    font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  }
  .header-row {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .page-title {
    grid-column: 2;
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #f3f6ff;
  }
  .capture-time {
    justify-self: end;
    white-space: nowrap;
    padding: 6px 10px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
    color: #e7edf8;
    font-size: 12px;
  }
  .device-info-table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    table-layout: fixed;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .device-info-table th, .device-info-table td {
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    padding: 8px;
    text-align: left;
    vertical-align: top;
    word-break: break-word;
  }
  .device-info-table th { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color: #e7edf8; }
  .device-info-table td { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); color: #e7edf8; }
  .panel {
    background: #1b2332;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09);
    border-radius: 10px;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.22);
    padding: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .panel-title {
    text-align: center;
    color: #9ec0ff;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 16px;
    margin: 0 0 8px;
  }
  .panel-info {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #e7edf8;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .results-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 12px;
  }
  .results-grid .panel { margin-bottom: 0; }
  @media (max-width: 980px) {
    .results-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  }
  .chart-canvas {
    width: 100%;
    display: block;
  }
</style>

<div class="header-row">
  <div></div>
  <div class="page-title">Channel Estimation Analysis (Group Delay)</div>
  {{#if capture_time}}<div class="capture-time">Capture Time: {{capture_time}}</div>{{/if}}
</div>

{{#if has_device_info}}
<table class="device-info-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>MacAddress</th>
      <th>Model</th>
      <th>Vendor</th>
      <th>SW Version</th>
      <th>HW Version</th>
      <th>Boot ROM</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>{{device_info.macAddress}}</td>
      <td>{{device_info.model}}</td>
      <td>{{device_info.vendor}}</td>
      <td>{{device_info.swVersion}}</td>
      <td>{{device_info.hwVersion}}</td>
      <td>{{device_info.bootRom}}</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
{{/if}}

<div id="mainContainer">
  <div id="alignedContainer"></div>
  <div id="resultsGrid" class="results-grid"></div>
</div>

<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Chart.js/2.9.4/Chart.min.js"></script>
<script>
(function waitForChart() {
    if (typeof Chart === 'undefined') return setTimeout(waitForChart, 50);
    pm.getData(function (err, value) {
        if (err) {
            console.error('Error getting data:', err);
            return;
        }

        const alignedContainer = document.getElementById('alignedContainer');
        const resultsGrid = document.getElementById('resultsGrid');

        // Check if this is a group-delay analysis
        if (value.analysis_type !== 'GROUP_DELAY') {
            resultsGrid.innerHTML =
                '<p style="color: #ff6b6b; font-size: 16px;">This visualization is only available for GROUP_DELAY analysis type. Current analysis type: ' +
                (value.analysis_type || 'Unknown') +
                '</p>';
            return;
        }

        const results = (Array.isArray(value.results) ? value.results.slice() : []).sort(function(a, b) {
            const af = Array.isArray(a && a.frequency) && a.frequency.length ? Number(a.frequency[0]) : Infinity;
            const bf = Array.isArray(b && b.frequency) && b.frequency.length ? Number(b.frequency[0]) : Infinity;
            if (isFinite(af) && isFinite(bf) && af !== bf) return af - bf;
            const al = Array.isArray(a && a.frequency) && a.frequency.length ? Number(a.frequency[a.frequency.length - 1]) : Infinity;
            const bl = Array.isArray(b && b.frequency) && b.frequency.length ? Number(b.frequency[b.frequency.length - 1]) : Infinity;
            if (isFinite(al) && isFinite(bl) && al !== bl) return al - bl;
            return String((a && a.channel_id) || '').localeCompare(String((b && b.channel_id) || ''));
        });

        if (!results || results.length === 0) {
            resultsGrid.innerHTML = '<p style="color:#cccccc;">No channel data available</p>';
            return;
        }

        const gridColor = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.12)';
        const tickColor = '#cccccc';
        const labelColor = '#ffffff';

        // Color palette for different channels - consistent mapping by stable label
        const colorPalette = [
            'rgb(75, 192, 192)',
            'rgb(255, 99, 132)',
            'rgb(54, 162, 235)',
            'rgb(255, 206, 86)',
            'rgb(153, 102, 255)',
            'rgb(255, 159, 64)',
            'rgb(199, 199, 199)',
            'rgb(83, 102, 255)'
        ];

        const toMHz = (hz) => hz / 1000000;
        const toMHzLabel = (hz) => String(Math.round(Number(hz) / 1000000));
        const roundNice = (v, step) => Math.round(v / step) * step;
        const floorNice = (v, step) => Math.floor(v / step) * step;
        const ceilNice = (v, step) => Math.ceil(v / step) * step;
        const normalizeGroupDelayUs = (arr) => {
            if (!Array.isArray(arr)) return [];
            let maxAbs = 0;
            for (let i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) {
                const v = Number(arr[i]);
                if (!isFinite(v)) continue;
                const a = Math.abs(v);
                if (a > maxAbs) maxAbs = a;
            }
            // If values look like seconds (e.g. ~1e-7), convert to microseconds for display.
            const scale = (maxAbs > 0 && maxAbs < 1e-3) ? 1e6 : 1;
            return arr.map(function(v) {
                const n = Number(v);
                return isFinite(n) ? (n * scale) : null;
            });
        };

        const safeLabel = (r, idx) => {
            if (r && r.channel_id !== undefined && r.channel_id !== null && r.channel_id !== '') {
                return 'Channel ' + String(r.channel_id);
            }
            return 'Result ' + String(idx + 1);
        };

        const rgbaFill = (rgb, a) => rgb.replace('rgb', 'rgba').replace(')', ', ' + a + ')');

        // Build master frequency axis (MHz) across all channels
        function uniqSortedNumeric(arr) {
            const m = Object.create(null);
            for (let i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) {
                const n = Number(arr[i]);
                if (!isFinite(n)) continue;
                m[String(n)] = true;
            }
            return Object.keys(m).map(k => Number(k)).sort((a, b) => a - b);
        }

        function alignSeries(masterMHz, freqHzArr, valuesArr) {
            const map = Object.create(null);
            const n = Math.min(Array.isArray(freqHzArr) ? freqHzArr.length : 0, Array.isArray(valuesArr) ? valuesArr.length : 0);
            for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                const fMHz = toMHz(Number(freqHzArr[i]));
                const v = Number(valuesArr[i]);
                if (!isFinite(fMHz)) continue;
                map[String(fMHz)] = isFinite(v) ? v : null;
            }
            const out = new Array(masterMHz.length);
            for (let j = 0; j < masterMHz.length; j++) {
                const key = String(masterMHz[j]);
                out[j] = (key in map) ? map[key] : null;
            }
            return out;
        }

        // Create top aligned chart container
        (function renderAlignedAllChannels() {
            const chartDiv = document.createElement('div');
            chartDiv.className = 'panel';

            const title = document.createElement('div');
            title.className = 'panel-title';
            title.textContent = 'All Channels (' + results.length + ') · Group Delay Aligned by Frequency (μs)';

            const info = document.createElement('div');
            info.className = 'panel-info';

            const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
            canvas.id = 'chart-all-aligned';
            canvas.height = 140;
            canvas.className = 'chart-canvas';

            chartDiv.appendChild(title);
            chartDiv.appendChild(info);
            chartDiv.appendChild(canvas);
            alignedContainer.appendChild(chartDiv);

            const allFreqHz = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < results.length; i++) {
                const freq = (results[i] && Array.isArray(results[i].frequency)) ? results[i].frequency : [];
                for (let j = 0; j < freq.length; j++) allFreqHz.push(freq[j]);
            }

            const masterMHz = uniqSortedNumeric(allFreqHz.map(toMHz));

            const datasets = results.map((r, idx) => {
                const label = safeLabel(r, idx);
                const color = colorPalette[idx % colorPalette.length];
                const freq = (r && Array.isArray(r.frequency)) ? r.frequency : [];
                const gd = normalizeGroupDelayUs((r && Array.isArray(r.group_delay_us)) ? r.group_delay_us : []);
                return {
                    label: label,
                    data: alignSeries(masterMHz, freq, gd),
                    borderColor: color,
                    backgroundColor: rgbaFill(color, 0.08),
                    borderWidth: 1.5,
                    fill: false,
                    pointRadius: 0,
                    pointHoverRadius: 0,
                    tension: 0.1,
                    spanGaps: false
                };
            });

            const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
            if (masterMHz.length) {
                info.textContent = 'Master Axis: ' + String(Math.round(masterMHz[0])) + ' - ' + String(Math.round(masterMHz[masterMHz.length - 1])) + ' MHz (' + masterMHz.length + ' points)';
            }

            new Chart(ctx, {
                type: 'line',
                data: {
                    labels: masterMHz.map(function(v){ return String(Math.round(v)); }),
                    datasets: datasets
                },
                options: {
                    responsive: true,
                    maintainAspectRatio: true,
                    legend: {
                        display: true,
                        position: 'bottom',
                        labels: { fontColor: labelColor }
                    },
                    tooltips: {
                        mode: 'index',
                        intersect: false
                    },
                    hover: {
                        mode: 'nearest',
                        intersect: false
                    },
                    scales: {
                        xAxes: [{
                            display: true,
                            scaleLabel: {
                                display: true,
                                labelString: 'Frequency (MHz)',
                                fontColor: labelColor
                            },
                            ticks: {
                                fontColor: tickColor,
                                maxRotation: 45,
                                minRotation: 45,
                                maxTicksLimit: 12
                            },
                            gridLines: { color: gridColor }
                        }],
                        yAxes: [{
                            display: true,
                            scaleLabel: {
                                display: true,
                                labelString: 'Group Delay (μs)',
                                fontColor: labelColor
                            },
                            ticks: {
                                fontColor: tickColor,
                                callback: function(value, index) {
                                    return (index % 2 === 0) ? value : '';
                                }
                            },
                            gridLines: { color: gridColor }
                        }]
                    }
                }
            });
        })();

        // Per-channel color map (do not assume channel_id; use stable labels)
        const labelsSorted = results.map((r, idx) => safeLabel(r, idx)).slice().sort();
        const labelToColor = {};
        labelsSorted.forEach((lbl, index) => {
            labelToColor[lbl] = colorPalette[index % colorPalette.length];
        });

        // Create a chart for each channel
        results.forEach((channelData, index) => {
            const label = safeLabel(channelData, index);
            const chartDiv = document.createElement('div');
            chartDiv.className = 'panel';

            const titleWrap = document.createElement('div');
            titleWrap.className = 'panel-title';
            titleWrap.textContent = label + ' Group Delay';

            const info = document.createElement('div');
            info.className = 'panel-info';

            const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
            canvas.id = 'chart-' + index;
            canvas.height = 130;
            canvas.className = 'chart-canvas';

            chartDiv.appendChild(titleWrap);
            chartDiv.appendChild(info);
            chartDiv.appendChild(canvas);
            resultsGrid.appendChild(chartDiv);

            const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

            const freq = (channelData && Array.isArray(channelData.frequency)) ? channelData.frequency : [];
            const gd = normalizeGroupDelayUs((channelData && Array.isArray(channelData.group_delay_us)) ? channelData.group_delay_us : []);
            const frequencyMHz = freq.map(function(f){ return toMHzLabel(f); });
            if (freq.length) {
                info.textContent = 'Frequency Range: ' + toMHzLabel(freq[0]) + ' - ' + toMHzLabel(freq[freq.length - 1]) + ' MHz (' + freq.length + ' points)';
            }

            const channelColor = labelToColor[label] || colorPalette[index % colorPalette.length];
            const gdFinite = gd.filter(function(v) { return typeof v === 'number' && isFinite(v); });
            let yMin;
            let yMax;
            if (gdFinite.length) {
                const localMin = Math.min.apply(null, gdFinite);
                const localMax = Math.max.apply(null, gdFinite);
                const center = (localMin + localMax) / 2;
                const halfRange = Math.max((localMax - localMin) / 2, 1e-6);
                const expandedHalfRange = halfRange * 1.1;
                let rawMin = center - expandedHalfRange;
                let rawMax = center + expandedHalfRange;
                const span = Math.max(rawMax - rawMin, 1e-6);
                // Pick a readable tick step and snap bounds to it.
                let tickStep = span / 4;
                if (tickStep <= 0.0001) tickStep = 0.0001;
                else if (tickStep <= 0.0002) tickStep = 0.0002;
                else if (tickStep <= 0.0005) tickStep = 0.0005;
                else if (tickStep <= 0.001) tickStep = 0.001;
                else if (tickStep <= 0.002) tickStep = 0.002;
                else if (tickStep <= 0.005) tickStep = 0.005;
                else if (tickStep <= 0.01) tickStep = 0.01;
                else if (tickStep <= 0.02) tickStep = 0.02;
                else if (tickStep <= 0.05) tickStep = 0.05;
                else tickStep = 0.1;
                yMin = floorNice(rawMin, tickStep);
                yMax = ceilNice(rawMax, tickStep);
            }

            new Chart(ctx, {
                type: 'line',
                data: {
                    labels: frequencyMHz,
                    datasets: [{
                        label: label + ' - Group Delay (μs)',
                        data: gd,
                        borderColor: channelColor,
                        backgroundColor: rgbaFill(channelColor, 0.1),
                        borderWidth: 1,
                        fill: false,
                        pointRadius: 0,
                        pointHoverRadius: 0,
                        tension: 0.1
                    }]
                },
                options: {
                    responsive: true,
                    maintainAspectRatio: true,
                    legend: {
                        display: true,
                        labels: { fontColor: labelColor }
                    },
                    scales: {
                        xAxes: [{
                            display: true,
                            scaleLabel: {
                                display: true,
                                labelString: 'Frequency (MHz)',
                                fontColor: labelColor
                            },
                            ticks: { fontColor: tickColor, maxTicksLimit: 10 },
                            gridLines: { color: gridColor }
                        }],
                        yAxes: [{
                            display: true,
                            scaleLabel: {
                                display: true,
                                labelString: 'Group Delay (μs)',
                                fontColor: labelColor
                            },
                            ticks: {
                                fontColor: tickColor,
                                min: yMin,
                                max: yMax,
                                maxTicksLimit: 2,
                                padding: 6,
                                callback: function(value) {
                                    var n = Number(value);
                                    if (!isFinite(n)) return value;
                                    if (Math.abs(n) >= 1) return n.toFixed(2);
                                    if (Math.abs(n) >= 0.1) return n.toFixed(3);
                                    if (Math.abs(n) >= 0.01) return n.toFixed(4);
                                    return n.toFixed(5);
                                }
                            },
                            gridLines: { color: gridColor }
                        }]
                    }
                }
            });
        });
    });
})();
</script>
`;

function constructVisualizerPayload() {
    const responseData = pm.response.json();
    function safeText(v) {
        if (v === undefined || v === null) return 'N/A';
        const s = String(v).trim();
        return s ? s : 'N/A';
    }
    function formatCaptureTime(raw) {
        const n = Number(raw);
        if (!isFinite(n)) return null;
        const d = new Date(n * 1000);
        if (!isFinite(d.getTime())) return null;
        const p = (x) => String(x).padStart(2, '0');
        return d.getUTCFullYear() + '-' + p(d.getUTCMonth() + 1) + '-' + p(d.getUTCDate()) + ' ' + p(d.getUTCHours()) + ':' + p(d.getUTCMinutes()) + ':' + p(d.getUTCSeconds()) + ' UTC';
    }
    function buildDeviceInfo(resp) {
        const sys = (resp && resp.system_description && typeof resp.system_description === 'object') ? resp.system_description : null;
        if (!sys) return null;
        return {
            macAddress: safeText(resp.mac_address).toLowerCase(),
            model: safeText(sys.MODEL),
            vendor: safeText(sys.VENDOR),
            swVersion: safeText(sys.SW_REV),
            hwVersion: safeText(sys.HW_REV),
            bootRom: safeText(sys.BOOTR)
        };
    }
    const deviceInfo = buildDeviceInfo(responseData);
    return {
        analysis_type: responseData && responseData.data ? responseData.data.analysis_type : undefined,
        results: (responseData && responseData.data && Array.isArray(responseData.data.results)) ? responseData.data.results : [],
        capture_time: formatCaptureTime((responseData && responseData.data && responseData.data.pnm_header && responseData.data.pnm_header.capture_time) || (responseData && responseData.pnm_header && responseData.pnm_header.capture_time)),
        has_device_info: !!deviceInfo,
        device_info: deviceInfo || {
            macAddress: safeText(responseData && responseData.mac_address).toLowerCase(),
            model: 'N/A', vendor: 'N/A', swVersion: 'N/A', hwVersion: 'N/A', bootRom: 'N/A'
        }
    };
}

pm.visualizer.set(template, constructVisualizerPayload());


(function () {
  function asObj(v) { return v && typeof v === 'object' && !Array.isArray(v) ? v : null; }
  function asList(v) { return Array.isArray(v) ? v : []; }
  function esc(s) { return String(s).replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;').replace(/'/g,'&#039;'); }
  function val(v) { return v === undefined || v === null || String(v).trim() === '' ? 'N/A' : String(v).trim(); }
  function sanitizeMac(value) {
    if (value === undefined || value === null) return 'N/A';
    var text = String(value).trim();
    if (!text) return 'N/A';
    var compact = text.replace(/[^0-9a-f]/gi, '').toLowerCase();
    if (compact.length !== 12) return text;
    return compact.match(/.{1,2}/g).join(':');
  }
  function pickSys(resp) {
    var top = asObj(resp && resp.system_description) || asObj(resp && resp.data && resp.data.system_description);
    if (top) return top;
    var data = asObj(resp && resp.data) || {};
    var results = asList(data.results);
    for (var i = 0; i < results.length; i++) {
      var r = asObj(results[i]) || {};
      var dd = asObj(r.device_details) || {};
      var sys = asObj(dd.system_description) || asObj(dd.sysDescr);
      if (sys) return sys;
    }
    var analysis = asList(data.analysis);
    for (var j = 0; j < analysis.length; j++) {
      var a = asObj(analysis[j]) || {};
      var dd2 = asObj(a.device_details) || {};
      var sys2 = asObj(dd2.system_description) || asObj(dd2.sysDescr);
      if (sys2) return sys2;
    }
    var keys = Object.keys(data);
    for (var k = 0; k < keys.length; k++) {
      var ch = asObj(data[keys[k]]) || {};
      var dd3 = asObj(ch.device_details) || {};
      var sys3 = asObj(dd3.system_description) || asObj(dd3.sysDescr);
      if (sys3) return sys3;
    }
    return null;
  }
  function inject() {
    if (document.querySelector('[data-mc-sysdescr-top]')) return;
    if (document.querySelector('.device-info') || document.body.textContent.indexOf('Device Info') !== -1) return;
    var resp;
    try { resp = pm.response.json(); } catch (e) { return; }
    var sys = pickSys(resp);
    if (!sys) return;
    var dark = false;
    try { dark = !!(window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches); } catch (e) {}
    var bg = dark ? '#151515' : '#ffffff';
    var border = dark ? '#2a2a2a' : '#d8dee9';
    var text = dark ? '#e8e8e8' : '#1f2937';
    var muted = dark ? '#dbe3ff' : '#334155';
    var chipBg = dark ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)' : '#f8fafc';
    var host = document.createElement('div');
    host.setAttribute('data-mc-sysdescr-top', '1');
    host.style.background = bg;
    host.style.border = '1px solid ' + border;
    host.style.borderRadius = '10px';
    host.style.padding = '12px';
    host.style.marginBottom = '14px';
    host.style.color = text;
    host.style.fontFamily = 'Arial, sans-serif';
    host.innerHTML = '' +
      '<div style="font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.7px;color:' + muted + ';margin-bottom:8px;">Device Info (CODING_AGENTS)</div>' +
      '<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;align-items:center;">' +
      '<div style="padding:6px 9px;border:1px solid ' + border + ';border-radius:999px;background:' + chipBg + ';font-size:12px;">MAC <span style="font-family:monospace;">' + esc(sanitizeMac(resp && resp.mac_address)) + '</span></div>' +
      '<div style="padding:6px 9px;border:1px solid ' + border + ';border-radius:999px;background:' + chipBg + ';font-size:12px;">Vendor ' + esc(val(sys.VENDOR)) + '</div>' +
      '<div style="padding:6px 9px;border:1px solid ' + border + ';border-radius:999px;background:' + chipBg + ';font-size:12px;">Model ' + esc(val(sys.MODEL)) + '</div>' +
      '<div style="padding:6px 9px;border:1px solid ' + border + ';border-radius:999px;background:' + chipBg + ';font-size:12px;">SW <span style="font-family:monospace;">' + esc(val(sys.SW_REV)) + '</span></div>' +
      '<div style="padding:6px 9px;border:1px solid ' + border + ';border-radius:999px;background:' + chipBg + ';font-size:12px;">HW <span style="font-family:monospace;">' + esc(val(sys.HW_REV)) + '</span></div>' +
      '<div style="padding:6px 9px;border:1px solid ' + border + ';border-radius:999px;background:' + chipBg + ';font-size:12px;">BOOTR <span style="font-family:monospace;">' + esc(val(sys.BOOTR)) + '</span></div>' +
      '</div>';
    var container = document.querySelector('.container');
    if (container) {
      container.insertBefore(host, container.firstChild);
    } else {
      document.body.insertBefore(host, document.body.firstChild);
    }
  }
  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', inject);
    setTimeout(inject, 0);
  } else {
    inject();
    setTimeout(inject, 0);
  }
})();
````
</details>
